creator: rodrigo@bebik.net
text:
All the tests I did in clean environments (jail and poudriere)
with or without the X option enabled retun an error caused by an
orphan file, bin/vwebp. What's the solution, cause it broken
my builds....

Regards,
- rodrigo

On 23/04/14 14:12 +0200, Johan van Selst wrote:
> > bin/vwebp is required with or without the X11 option.
> 
> No, it is not. vwebp requires libGL with a truckload of X-specific
> dependencies. The application won't be built if these dependencies
> are not present.
> 
> Granted, the configure script is not perfect, and the program will
> be built if the libraries are present - even if you tell it not to.
> But the difference in dependencies is significant. And the staged build
> will ensure that vwebp is not installed when it is not desired.
> 
> Support for installation without vwebp was specifically requested by
> people who want to use the conversion tools on servers without X
> installed.
> 
> 
> Regards,
> Johan
